headline: The Only Public Space Stock Even Elon Musk Can’t Dismiss
summary: Here’s the uncomfortable truth for anyone who wants exposure to the space economy: the company that dominates it isn’t public. SpaceX prints launches, prints Starlink revenue, and prints headlines. You can’t buy it. So when SpaceX itself bothers to name the rivals it actually watches, that list matters. The names cited include United Launch Alliance, ... The Only Public Space Stock Even Elon Musk Can’t Dismiss

headline: L3Harris, Northrop Win Pentagon Contracts. Karman Bolsters AI Efforts.

headline: Is It Too Late To Consider Northrop Grumman (NOC) After Recent Share Price Softness?
summary: For investors considering whether Northrop Grumman at around US$539 per share is still a solid entry point or whether the stock price already reflects its strengths, this article reviews what the current valuation signals indicate. The stock is down 2.9% over the past week and 5.1% over the past month. It is still up 13.3% over the past year, 27.2% over three years and 57.2% over five years, which provides mixed signals about how the market currently views its risk and return profile. Recent...

headline: Nuclear weapons could soon be hosted in more NATO nations — what it means for defense stocks
summary: The U.S. is reportedly exploring plans to expand its nuclear weapons-hosting arrangements to include more NATO countries in Europe.
